nodes.name: 🎲 Atraso aleatório 10–60s (Sheets)
nodes.notes: Define _sheetStaggerSec ∈ {10,20,30,40,50,60} (1 valor aleatório por execução) antes do Wait; v0.8.2 passo fixo 10s.

nodes.name: ⏳ Esperar N s (rate limit Sheets)
nodes.notes: Duração = _sheetStaggerSec (10, 20, … ou 60 **segundos**, ver 🎲 Atraso). Encadeamento Sheets reduz concorrência na API.

nodes.name: 📊 Salvar → CDP_Resultados (Detalhado)
nodes.notes: v0.5.0: Appends to 'Detalhado' tab (was 'Results'). One row per PartResult, including not_found rows. | v0.8.0: retry 5×/5s; no continueOnFail (retries work; fail loud if Sheets still errors).

nodes.name: 📊 Construir Relatório Histórico
nodes.notes: CDP v1.0: Builds one historical job row. Reads requester/duplicate context from callback query params because current scraper API callbacks do not include arbitrary job_metadata.

nodes.name: 📝 Salvar → CDP_Resultados (Histórico)
nodes.notes: Appends to 'Historico'. skus_encontrados/taxa_sucesso_sku use priced_sku_count (FOUND_PRICE) only; NO_PRICE/NOT_FOUND/BLOCKED/ERROR stay separate in resumo_sites.

nodes.name: 📧 Formatar Email de Erro
nodes.notes: Ops alert: per-site blocked (e.g. Melibox) is warning-only when no job-level errors.

nodes.name: 📋 Extrair Resumo
nodes.notes: v0.7.5: fallback SITE/LINK sem preço; STATUS sem preço. v0.7.4: body do Webhook.

nodes.name: 📋 Salvar → CDP_Resultados (Resumo)
nodes.notes: v0.5.0: Appends to 'Resumo' tab. Create this tab with columns: CODIGO, STATUS, MELHOR_PRECO, SITE, LINK, DATA | v0.8.0: retry 5×/5s; no continueOnFail (retries work; fail loud if Sheets still errors).

nodes.name: ✅ Marcar ENCONTRADO → CDP_SKUs
nodes.notes: Updates PROCESSADO/ENCONTRADO by row_number using sticky status priority (Encontrado/Sem preço are not downgraded by later Não encontrado callbacks).

nodes.name: 📣 Formatar Notificação Conclusão
nodes.notes: Assistente CDP — resumo sites + link relatório (lib).

nodes.name: 📋 Resumo inline? (≤12 SKUs)
nodes.notes: When >12 SKUs, bulk branch sends CSV. Inline text for smaller jobs.

nodes.name: 📱 Telegram: Resumo conclusão
nodes.notes: Enable after Telegram credential is configured (same bot as trigger).

nodes.name: 🔧 Expandir NOTIFICADO (✅ Sim)
nodes.notes: CODIGOs from webhook body (same SKUs as API). Avoids $('📋 Extrair Resumo') when that branch did not run.

nodes.name: 🔧 Expandir NOTIFICADO (❌ Não)
nodes.notes: CODIGOs from webhook body. Use only when no notification was possible or all sends failed.

nodes.name: ✅ Marcar NOTIFICADO → CDP_SKUs
nodes.notes: v0.6.10: Updates NOTIFICADO per SKU after notify outcome (✅ Sim / ❌ Não). | v0.8.0: retry 5×/5s; no continueOnFail (retries work; fail loud if Sheets still errors).

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: $('📣 Formatar Notificação Conclusão').item.json }];

nodes.name: 🔄 Retomar pós-falha Telegram
nodes.notes: Restores 📣 Formatar Notificação Conclusão payload for Email branch.

nodes.name: 📦 Bulk Mode? (>12 SKUs)
nodes.notes: True → bulk CSV + Telegram document. v0.8.6 threshold 12 SKUs.

nodes.name: 🗂️ Gerar Excel Bulk
nodes.notes: CDP v1.2: builds UTF-8 CSV from canonical result semantics; found means FOUND_PRICE only.

nodes.name: 🔀 Rota Bulk (Telegram / Email)
nodes.notes: Routes to Telegram doc or Email based on notify field.

nodes.name: 📱 Formatar Caption Bulk (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Builds Markdown caption for the sendDocument call.

nodes.name: 📧 Formatar HTML Bulk (Email)
nodes.notes: Builds rich HTML email with stat grid, progress bar, and Sheets CTA.

nodes.name: 📧 Email: Enviar Excel Bulk
nodes.notes: Sends HTML email + CSV attachment to reply_email from job metadata.

nodes.name: 🔧 Bulk: Expandir NOTIFICADO (✅ Sim)
nodes.notes: Marks all SKUs as NOTIFICADO after bulk send (both channels converge here).

nodes.name: ✅ Bulk: Marcar NOTIFICADO → CDP_SKUs
nodes.notes: Updates NOTIFICADO=✅ Sim for all SKUs in this job by row_number. | v0.8.0: retry 5x/5s; no continueOnFail (retries work; fail loud if Sheets still errors).

nodes.name: 📱 Telegram: Enviar Excel Bulk
nodes.notes: v0.8.4: native Telegram credential (same as resumo). Sheets run before this node. continueOnFail so a send failure does not block NOTIFICADO.

nodes.name: 🧺 Coletar ENCONTRADO

parameters.jsCode:
const marks = $input.all().map((i) => i.json);
return [{ json: { marks } }];

nodes.notes: Collapse marking items into one payload so the sheet read runs once (and merge feeders).

nodes.name: 📄 Ler CDP_SKUs (ENCONTRADO)
nodes.notes: Read SKUs rows (CODIGO + row_number) so every duplicate CODIGO row can be marked.

nodes.name: 🧭 Mapear ENCONTRADO por row
nodes.notes: Fan out one update per matching sheet row_number (handles duplicate CODIGO rows).

nodes.name: 🧺 Coletar NOTIFICADO

parameters.jsCode:
const marks = $input.all().map((i) => i.json);
return [{ json: { marks } }];

nodes.notes: Collapse marking items into one payload so the sheet read runs once (and merge feeders).

nodes.name: 📄 Ler CDP_SKUs (NOTIFICADO)
nodes.notes: Read SKUs rows (CODIGO + row_number) so every duplicate CODIGO row can be marked.

nodes.name: 🧭 Mapear NOTIFICADO por row
nodes.notes: Fan out one update per matching sheet row_number (handles duplicate CODIGO rows).

nodes.name: 🧺 Bulk: Coletar NOTIFICADO

parameters.jsCode:
const marks = $input.all().map((i) => i.json);
return [{ json: { marks } }];

nodes.notes: Collapse marking items into one payload so the sheet read runs once (and merge feeders).

nodes.name: 📄 Bulk: Ler CDP_SKUs (NOTIFICADO)
nodes.notes: Read SKUs rows (CODIGO + row_number) so every duplicate CODIGO row can be marked.

nodes.name: 🧭 Bulk: Mapear NOTIFICADO por row
nodes.notes: Fan out one update per matching sheet row_number (handles duplicate CODIGO rows).

nodes.name: 📣 Preparar handoff notifier
nodes.notes: Aggregate delivery: POST compact summary to cdp_notifier.
